summary: Added startup repair for legacy Codex OAuth Provider Profiles whose mutable OAuth home was configured above the exclusive capacity of one. API create/update validation and OAuth finalization already enforce one. The broader Omnigent lifecycle backlog remains open.

gapStatuses.requirement: Complete concurrency-one enforcement across the profile lifecycle
gapStatuses.resolved: Startup seeding now repairs every existing codex_cli oauth_volume/oauth_home profile to max_parallel_runs=1; a regression test covers a legacy value of seven. Existing API create/update validation and OAuth finalization also enforce one.
gapStatuses.remaining: Runtime selection, host allocation, reconnect, and disconnect must use the exclusive lease lifecycle; migration/readiness coverage beyond startup repair remains open.

gapStatuses.requirement: Use one exclusive capacity lane for all consumers and maintenance
gapStatuses.remaining: Wire direct runs, static/on-demand Omnigent runs, reconnect, disconnect, and credential maintenance to provider-profile-manager:codex_cli with idempotent acquisition and release-last semantics.

gapStatuses.requirement: Define secret-free credential, binding, generation, and host-lease contracts
gapStatuses.remaining: Add runtime-neutral refs, durable persistence, ownership and generation validation, and cross-profile rejection.

gapStatuses.requirement: Materialize and preflight the exact destination OAuth home
gapStatuses.remaining: Mount only the selected OAuth volume, clear competing credentials, repair permissions, and run secret-free destination authentication and generation checks.

gapStatuses.requirement: Provide profile-bound static and on-demand hosts and routing
gapStatuses.remaining: Implement the common binding/readiness contract, stable registration, idempotent launch, executionProfileRef resolution, exact-host routing, and retry-safe first-message behavior.

gapStatuses.requirement: Implement generation, drain, cleanup, reconciliation, and recovery
gapStatuses.remaining: Coordinate drain and generation advancement, reject stale hosts, perform ordered release-last cleanup, reconcile restarts, and persist safe live-reattach/cold-restore refs.

gapStatuses.requirement: Expose redacted lifecycle diagnostics and failure attribution
gapStatuses.remaining: Publish secret-safe profile, lease, binding, preflight, session, cooldown/authentication, terminal, and cleanup evidence.

gapStatuses.requirement: Add required boundary and combined-stack verification
gapStatuses.resolved: Added focused startup-repair regression coverage and completed syntax and diff checks.
gapStatuses.remaining: The focused Python suite could not start because pytest is absent. Runtime lifecycle, contention, routing, materialization, retry, cleanup, recovery, isolation, and non-leakage coverage remains missing.

targetedLocalChecks.details: Repository pre-test audits passed, but /usr/local/bin/python has no pytest module, so tests did not start.
